properties.query: SELECT t.student_id, t.student_name, t.course_id, t.assignment_title, t.midterm_score, t.final_score, t.midterm_35, t.final_35, t.attendance_score, t.assignment_score, t.total_score, CASE WHEN t.total_score >= 95 THEN 'A+' WHEN t.total_score >= 90 THEN 'A' WHEN t.total_score >= 85 THEN 'B+' WHEN t.total_score >= 80 THEN 'B' WHEN t.total_score >= 75 THEN 'C+' WHEN t.total_score >= 70 THEN 'C' WHEN t.total_score >= 65 THEN 'D+' WHEN t.total_score >= 60 THEN 'D' ELSE 'F' END AS grade FROM ( SELECT g.student_id, u.name AS student_name, g.course_id, asg.assignment_title, g.midterm_score, g.final_score, ROUND(g.midterm_score / 100.0 * 35, 2) AS midterm_35, ROUND(g.final_score / 100.0 * 35, 2) AS final_35, COALESCE(att.attendance_20, 0) AS attendance_score, COALESCE(asg.assignment_10, 0) AS assignment_score, ROUND( (g.midterm_score / 100.0 * 35) + (g.final_score / 100.0 * 35) + COALESCE(att.attendance_20, 0) + COALESCE(asg.assignment_10, 0), 2 ) AS total_score FROM exams g JOIN users u ON g.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.student_id, s.course_id, ROUND( SUM( CASE WHEN a.attendance_status = 'PRESENT' THEN 1 WHEN a.attendance_status = 'LATE' THEN 0.5 WHEN a.attendance_status = 'EXCUSED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 2 ) AS attendance_20 FROM attendance a JOIN sessions s ON a.session_id = s.id GROUP BY a.student_id, s.course_id ) att ON g.student_id = att.student_id AND g.course_id = att.course_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sub.student_id, ass.course_id, ass.title AS assignment_title, ROUND(MAX(sub.score) / 100.0 * 15, 2) AS assignment_10 FROM assignment_submissions sub JOIN assignments ass ON sub.assignment_id = ass.id GROUP BY sub.student_id, ass.course_id, ass.title ) asg ON g.student_id = asg.student_id AND g.course_id = asg.course_id WHERE g.student_id = ? ) t ORDER BY t.student_name;

SELECT t.student_id, t.student_name, t.course_id, t.assignment_title, t.midterm_score, t.final_score, t.midterm_35, t.final_35, t.attendance_score, t.assignment_score, t.total_score, CASE WHEN t.total_score >= 95 THEN 'A+' WHEN t.total_score >= 90 THEN 'A' WHEN t.total_score >= 85 THEN 'B+' WHEN t.total_score >= 80 THEN 'B' WHEN t.total_score >= 75 THEN 'C+' WHEN t.total_score >= 70 THEN 'C' WHEN t.total_score >= 65 THEN 'D+' WHEN t.total_score >= 60 THEN 'D' ELSE 'F' END AS grade FROM ( SELECT g.student_id, u.name AS student_name, g.course_id, asg.assignment_title, g.midterm_score, g.final_score, ROUND(g.midterm_score / 100.0 * 35, 2) AS midterm_35, ROUND(g.final_score / 100.0 * 35, 2) AS final_35, COALESCE(att.attendance_20, 0) AS attendance_score, COALESCE(asg.assignment_10, 0) AS assignment_score, ROUND( (g.midterm_score / 100.0 * 35) + (g.final_score / 100.0 * 35) + COALESCE(att.attendance_20, 0) + COALESCE(asg.assignment_10, 0), 2 ) AS total_score FROM exams g JOIN users u ON g.student_id = u.id JOIN courses c ON g.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.student_id, s.course_id, ROUND( SUM( CASE WHEN a.attendance_status = 'PRESENT' THEN 1 WHEN a.attendance_status = 'LATE' THEN 0.5 WHEN a.attendance_status = 'EXCUSED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 2 ) AS attendance_20 FROM attendance a JOIN sessions s ON a.session_id = s.id GROUP BY a.student_id, s.course_id ) att ON g.student_id = att.student_id AND g.course_id = att.course_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sub.student_id, ass.course_id, ass.title AS assignment_title, ROUND(MAX(sub.score) / 100.0 * 15, 2) AS assignment_10 FROM assignment_submissions sub JOIN assignments ass ON sub.assignment_id = ass.id GROUP BY sub.student_id, ass.course_id, ass.title ) asg ON g.student_id = asg.student_id AND g.course_id = asg.course_id WHERE c.professor_id = ? ) t WHERE t.student_name LIKE CONCAT('%', ?, '%') ORDER BY t.student_name;
